description: DRAFT corpus manifest generated 2026-04-30 from 39 academic records in the KnowledgeStore (kb/rag/knowledge/knowledge.sqlite3). 23 entries selected: 17 high-quality topic-relevant papers (chunk_count >= 9, body_source=pdf), 3 outlier/off-domain papers to validate metric 1 off-topic detection, and 3 low-chunk stubs (chunk_count <= 4) to validate metric 5. 16 records excluded: audio/speech/climate challenge papers clearly outside domain scope. Category assignments: equation_heavy=math-formula-heavy papers, table_heavy=data-table-heavy papers, prose_heavy=text-narrative papers, outlier=clearly off-topic for metric-1 testing, null=uncategorized. Operator must review categories and source_id accuracy before promoting to research_eval_benchmark_v0_corpus.json.
